This family is part of the larger order Cerithioidea, which includes various species of freshwater snails. The order Cerithioidea is part of the subclass Caenogastropoda, which encompasses snails with a more advanced shell shape. The subclass Caenogastropoda is a subcategory of the class Gastropoda, which is a broad group of snails and slugs.
